headlines.h: Exclusive: Government Announces New Standard: “This Memeworthy?"
headlines.b: Applies to boxes, laundry baskets, and your freshly folded clothes (especially those).

headlines.h: Markets React To: the cat didn’t even question it
headlines.b: Treat futures up. Productivity down. The couch remains occupied.

headlines.h: Opinion: instead of buying a lucky charm cat for my store… got a real one instead. (And You Know It)
headlines.b: Experts urge humans to stop taking it personally and start providing snacks.

headlines.h: BREAKING: “Then they’ll come back for snacks”
headlines.b: Officials confirm this is being treated as a "meow-jor" development. (Filed: 2026-04-14)
